description: Create a Python script at /home/ga/Documents/generate_calendar.py that generates a styled HTML calendar for November 2026. The calendar must display the following events within the same table cells (<td>) as their respective date numbers: 'Math Olympiad' (Nov 5), 'Science Fair' (Nov 12), 'Museum Field Trip' (Nov 18), and 'Thanksgiving Break' (Nov 26). The HTML must include a <style> block for table borders. The script must be executed to save the final HTML output to /home/ga/Documents/school_calendar.html.
